Enum Class HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent>
jakarta.faces.component.html.HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent>, Constable
Enclosing class:
HtmlEvents
public static enum HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent extends Enum<HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent>
Events supported by all HTML document elements.
Since:
5.0

    • values

      public static HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent[] values()

    • valueOf

      public static HtmlEvents.HtmlDocumentElementEvent valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
